zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stafford於大約1425年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾葛拉芙頓時，她的父親Sir Humphrey Stafford26歲，母親Eleanor Aylesbury20歲。她於1447年1月27日與Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾阿爾斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年4月19日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾波維其可享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stafford于大约1425年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾葛拉芙頓时，她的父亲Sir Humphrey Stafford26岁，母亲Eleanor Aylesbury20岁。她于1447年1月27日与Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾阿爾斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年4月19日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾波維其可享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stafford was born about 1425, in Grafton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Humphrey Stafford, was 26 and her mother, Eleanor Aylesbury, was 20. She married Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp on 27 January 1447, in Alcester, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 19 April 1500, in Powick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stafford est née environ 1425, à Grafton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Humphrey Stafford, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Aylesbury, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp le 27 janvier 1447, à Alcester, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 avril 1500, à Powick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stafford è nata il circa 1425 nel Grafton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Humphrey Stafford, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Aylesbury, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp il 27 gennaio 1447, nel Alcester, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 aprile 1500, nel Powick, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Staffordが約1425年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアグラフトンで生まれた時，父Sir Humphrey Staffordは26歳，母Eleanor Aylesburyは20歳であった。1447年1月27日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアルセスターでRichard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年4月19日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアポウィックで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stafford(이)가 대략 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 그라프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Humphrey Stafford(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Aylesbury(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1447년 1월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 알스스터에서 Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 4월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 파윅에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stafford nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Grafton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Humphrey Stafford, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Aylesbury, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp em 27 de janeiro de 1447, em Alcester, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de abril de 1500, em Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stafford родилась около 1425 г. в местности графтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Humphrey Stafford было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Aylesbury, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp 27 января 1447 г. в местности алсестир, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 апреля 1500 г. в местности поуикк, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.
